summary: Frontend-only testing for 3 UI changes: (1) Mini Groove hidden, (2) Composer width sync, (3) Mobile filter dropdown styling. All tests passed on both desktop (1920px) and mobile (390px) viewports.

test_results.mini_groove_hidden_dom: PASS - Button NOT in DOM (wrapped with {false && ...} at line 310)

test_results.composer_width_desktop: PASS - Composer 640px wide, perfectly aligned with post cards (0px diff)
test_results.composer_no_inline_maxwidth: PASS - No inline maxWidth style on composer bar
test_results.composer_shadow: PASS - Composer has shadow class (not shadow-sm)
test_results.filter_dropdown_centered_mobile: PASS - Menu centered on screen (0px center diff)
test_results.filter_item_padding: PASS - py-2.5 padding (10px top/bottom) for thumb-friendly tapping
test_results.haul_modal_structure: PASS - Records search above location input
test_results.now_spinning_chip_emoji: PASS - 🎵 emoji on Now Spinning chip

code_verification.HivePage.js_line_908: py-2.5 and justify-center on menu items

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 UI changes verified working: (1) Mini Groove button and drawer hidden with {false && ...} - not deleted, just UI hidden. (2) Composer bar now fills same max-w-2xl container as posts, 640px wide on desktop, no inline maxWidth. (3) Filter dropdown 280px wide on mobile, centered, with py-2.5 padding for tap targets. Previous iteration 245 tested Haul modal restructure, Now Spinning emoji, etc.
